command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
sed -n '2394,2495p' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=_ACTIVE_BG='
sed -n '1658,1710p' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=_WORKER_ALIVE='
sed -n '583,610p' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
echo '=PAC_DEF_FUNCS='
grep -n 'def ' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py
echo '=PAC_TICK_BODY='
sed -n '1050,1213p' runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py
ENDSSH
